3920.name: Airona
3920.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons</style> Airona. After a brief cast, revives up to <style="accent-gn">4</style> nearby teammates. <style="accent-gn">Weakness: Cannot be affected by the same type of effect within 60s (Weakness effects are enhanced in party dungeons of Nightmare mode).</style>

3921.name: Tina
3921.description:
Summons Tina to channel the power of time, reducing the Skill CDs of yourself and up to 10 surrounding allies for a certain period.
(Cannot be affected by the same type of effect within 60s.)

3922.name: Olvera
3922.dialogue: Don't blink, this is the cold light slashing towards you!
3922.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons</style> Olvera to shuttle back and forth in a forward direction, drawing in enemies encountered along the path, dealing <style="physical">Attack DMG</style>, and <linktext=3000><style="ItemQuality_5">interrupting</style></linktext> their actions. When dealing DMG, there is a chance to inflict Seed of Lightning on the targets for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>. Dealing DMG to targets with Seed of Lightning will cause an explosion (CD: <style="accent-gn">2s</style>), dealing <style="magic">Magic DMG</style>. Any target with Seed of Lightning defeated will reduce CD time by <style="accent-gn">20s</style>.

3923.name: Muku Chief
3923.dialogue: Smash! Smash! Smash! Destruction is art!
3923.description:
Summons Boss: Muku Chief to slam the ground around, dealing AoE Attack DMG. Holds 2 charges.
Upon the skill cast, your Crit and Crit DMG are increased for a period.

3925.name: Mighty Colossus
3925.description:
Transforms into Elite: Mighty Colossus to charge and deal Attack DMG. The longer you charge, the greater the effect on Resilience breaking. Each stack increases the Resilience Break done by 50%. (3 stacks at Tier 3 and 6 stacks at Tier 5.)
Upon the skill cast, your Resilience Break Bonus is increased for a period.

3926.name: Storm Goblin King
3926.dialogue: Come here, where else do you want to go?!
3926.description:
Summons Boss: Storm Goblin King to release a meteor shower at the target, dealing Magic DMG. Upon the skill cast, your Luck and DMG dealt and healing of Luck effects are increased for a period.
Tier 5: While active, trigger​ all unlocked ​passive Luck effects​ from your Plains Battle Imagines.
passiveBufDescriptions:
When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Launches a meteor strike, dealing Magic DMG equal to 22.4% ATK (CD: 0.3s).
Tier 5: Each time a meteor is summoned, immediately reduces the CD of this skill by 0.5s. Triggers at most once per second.

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Launches a meteor strike, dealing Magic DMG equal to 29.12% ATK (CD: 0.3s).
Tier 5: Each time a meteor is summoned, immediately reduces the CD of this skill by 0.5s. Triggers at most once per second.

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Launches a meteor strike, dealing Magic DMG equal to 35.84% ATK (CD: 0.3s).
Tier 5: Each time a meteor is summoned, immediately reduces the CD of this skill by 0.5s. Triggers at most once per second.

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Launches a meteor strike, dealing Magic DMG equal to 42.56% ATK (CD: 0.3s).
Tier 5: Each time a meteor is summoned, immediately reduces the CD of this skill by 0.5s. Triggers at most once per second.

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Launches a meteor strike, dealing Magic DMG equal to 49.28% ATK (CD: 0.3s).
Tier 5: Each time a meteor is summoned, immediately reduces the CD of this skill by 0.5s. Triggers at most once per second.

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Launches a meteor strike, dealing Magic DMG equal to 56% ATK (CD: 0.3s).
Tier 5: Each time a meteor is summoned, immediately reduces the CD of this skill by 0.5s. Triggers at most once per second.

3927.name: Jungle Goblin Warrior
3927.dialogue: Roar... no one can stop me!
3927.description:
Summons Elite: Jungle Goblin Warrior and roars.
Casts the skill, temporarily boosting Strength, empowering the next attack to deal bonus Attack DMG in a limited area, and interrupting the target's actions.

3928.name: Muku Scout
3928.dialogue: Haven't you heard? No matter how skilled in martial arts, one still fears a kitchen knife!
3928.description:
Summons Elite: Muku Scout to chase the target, dealing Attack DMG.
Upon the skill cast, immediately gains full passive effects, and the stack count is doubled within 20s.
passiveBufDescriptions: Dealing DMG <style="accent-gn">10</style> times in a row within <style="accent-gn">3s</style> grants a buff that increases ATK by <style="accent-gn">2%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times, lasting for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

Dealing DMG <style="accent-gn">10</style> times in a row within <style="accent-gn">3s</style> grants a buff that increases ATK by <style="accent-gn">2.6%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times, lasting for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

Dealing DMG <style="accent-gn">10</style> times in a row within <style="accent-gn">3s</style> grants a buff that increases ATK by <style="accent-gn">3.2%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times, lasting for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

Dealing DMG <style="accent-gn">10</style> times in a row within <style="accent-gn">3s</style> grants a buff that increases ATK by <style="accent-gn">3.8%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times, lasting for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

Dealing DMG <style="accent-gn">10</style> times in a row within <style="accent-gn">3s</style> grants a buff that increases ATK by <style="accent-gn">4.4%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times, lasting for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

Dealing DMG <style="accent-gn">10</style> times in a row within <style="accent-gn">3s</style> grants a buff that increases ATK by <style="accent-gn">5%</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">3</style> times, lasting for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.

3929.name: Void Arachnocrab
3929.description: <style="accent-gn">Transforms into Elite</style>: Void Arachnocrab, and gains <style="accent-gn">Invincibility</style> for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>.
passiveBufDescriptions: After you take <style="accent-gn">20</style> hits, your Armor increases <style="accent-gn">450</style> for <style="accent-gn">15s</style>
After you take <style="accent-gn">20</style> hits, your Armor increases <style="accent-gn">585</style> for <style="accent-gn">15s</style>
After you take <style="accent-gn">20</style> hits, your Armor increases <style="accent-gn">720</style> for <style="accent-gn">15s</style>

After you take <style="accent-gn">10</style> hits, your Armor increases <style="accent-gn">1125</style> for <style="accent-gn">15s</style>

3930.name: Brigand Guard Captain
3930.dialogue: Stand behind me, I will block everything!
3930.description: <style="accent-gn">Transforms into Elite</style>: Brigand Guard Captain to grant Earth Shield, recovering a percentage of lost HP when you are attacked, up to <style="accent-gn">9</style> times. During this, your <style="accent-gn">Endurance</style> is increased.

3934.name: Brigand Scout Leader
3934.dialogue: Hey, I'm here... no no no, I'm actually here...
3934.description:
Summons Elite: Brigand Scout Leader to execute continuous attacks on the designated target, dealing Attack DMG and interrupting their actions.
Upon the skill cast, your Agility is increased for a period.

3935.name: Golden Juggernaut
3935.description:
Transforms into Boss: Golden Juggernaut, granting yourself and 10 allies Shield. When dealing DMG, the shielded targets generate Thunderstrike (CD: 0.5s), and the DMG dealt depends on the friendly ATK.
(This effect cannot stack and only one will be effective.)

3936.name: Lizardman Mage
3936.description:
Summons Elite: Lizardman Mage to conjure the Water of Silence at the target's location, dealing Magic DMG and inflicting Slow.
Upon the skill cast, your Ice Bonus is increased for a period.

3937.name: Lizardman Hunter
3937.description:
Summons Elite: Lizardman Hunter to chant briefly, dealing Magic DMG.
Upon the skill cast, your Luck and Lucky Strike Chance are increased for a period.
passiveBufDescriptions: When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Performs a Thunderstrike, dealing Thunder <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">11.2%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>).

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Performs a Thunderstrike, dealing Thunder <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">14.56%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>).

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Performs a Thunderstrike, dealing Thunder <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">17.92%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>).

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Performs a Thunderstrike, dealing Thunder <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">21.28%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>).

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Performs a Thunderstrike, dealing Thunder <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">24.64%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>).

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Performs a Thunderstrike, dealing Thunder <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">28%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>).

3938.name: Phantom Arachnocrab
3938.dialogue: Cocooned? Oh no, this is just a temporary hibernation...
3938.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons Boss</style>: Phantom Arachnocrab and transforms into a cocoon. Following a brief delay, the cocoon bursts, dealing <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> and <linktext=3000><style="ItemQuality_5">interrupting</style></linktext> the actions of the affected target. Your <style="accent-gn">Mastery</style> is increased for a period.

3939.name: Great Warhog
3939.description:
Summons Elite: Great Warhog to release a Lightning Orb forward, dealing Attack DMG.
Upon the skill cast, your Light Bonus is increased for a period.

3940.name: Storm Goblin Warrior
3940.dialogue: Let it go with the wind...
3940.description:
Summons Elite: Storm Goblin Warrior to continuously release Whirlwind Slash, dealing Attack DMG and pulling in all surrounding units.
Upon the skill cast, your Wind Bonus is increased for a period.

3941.name: Void Bzzar
3941.dialogue: I am a little bee, flying among the flowers... Hehe!
3941.description: <style="accent-gn">Transforms into Elite</style>: Void Bzzar for a period of time, during which you can release stings and projectiles.
passiveBufDescriptions: When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Fires a poisoned sting at the target, dealing <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">11.2%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Fires a poisoned sting at the target, dealing <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">14.56%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Fires a poisoned sting at the target, dealing <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">17.92%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Fires a poisoned sting at the target, dealing <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">21.28%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Fires a poisoned sting at the target, dealing <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">24.64%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

When a Lucky Strike is launched, the Lucky Effect may be activated: Fires a poisoned sting at the target, dealing <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">28%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

3942.name: Venobzzar Incubator
3942.description:
Summons Boss: Venobzzar Incubator to continuously attack surrounding units, dealing Attack DMG. Each attack inflicts Vulnerability on the target, and your DMG dealt to the target is increased.
(This effect cannot stack and only one will be effective.)

3943.name: Iron Fang
3943.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons Boss</style>: Iron Fang to deliver AoE <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> to nearby enemies, inflicting a <style="accent-gn">100%</style> <linktext=3004><style="ItemQuality_5">Wound</style></linktext> on all affected targets for <style="accent-gn">15s</style>.
passiveBufDescriptions: Gains permanent Super Armor. When HP drops to <style="accent-gn">30%</style>, gains <style="accent-gn">8%</style> All Element DMG Reduction.
Gains permanent Super Armor. When HP drops to <style="accent-gn">30%</style>, gains <style="accent-gn">10.4%</style> All Element DMG Reduction.

Gains permanent Super Armor. When HP drops to <style="accent-gn">30%</style>, gains <style="accent-gn">20%</style> All Element DMG Reduction.

3944.name: Celestial Flier
3944.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons Boss</style>: Celestial Flier to charge forward, dealing Ice <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> and <linktext=3000><style="ItemQuality_5">interrupting</style></linktext> the targets' actions. After casting, your <style="accent-gn">Haste</style> is increased for a period of time.

3945.name: Lizardman King
3945.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons Boss</style>: Lizardman King to deal Ice <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> to nearby enemies and <linktext=3001><style="ItemQuality_5">Silence</style></linktext> them for <style="accent-gn">10s</style>.
passiveBufDescriptions: When dealing DMG, gains a <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to invoke Tidal Force, reducing the CD of this skill by <style="accent-gn">5s</style> and enhancing your weapon, causing your next skill to deal additional <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">22.4%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">5s</style>)

When dealing DMG, gains a <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to invoke Tidal Force, reducing the CD of this skill by <style="accent-gn">5s</style> and enhancing your weapon, causing your next skill to deal additional <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">29.12%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">5s</style>)

When dealing DMG, gains a <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to invoke Tidal Force, reducing the CD of this skill by <style="accent-gn">5s</style> and enhancing your weapon, causing your next skill to deal additional <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">35.84%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">5s</style>)

When dealing DMG, gains a <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to invoke Tidal Force, reducing the CD of this skill by <style="accent-gn">5s</style> and enhancing your weapon, causing your next skill to deal additional <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">56%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">5s</style>)

3946.name: Goblin King
3946.dialogue: Are you ready? Full army attack!
3946.description:
Resonates with the power of Boss: Goblin King, summoning 1–3 goblins at random to cast skills.
Always summons 1 from Elite: Goblin Guard or Elite: Goblin Warrior.
Has a chance to additionally summon 1 Elite: Jungle Goblin Warrior.
Has a chance to summon 1 from Elite: Storm Goblin Axe or Boss: Storm Goblin King. Has a 30% chance to summon the Boss.
activeEffectParams: Additional Probability to Summon Elite or Boss

3947.name: Muku Vanguard
3947.description:
Summons Elite: Muku Vanguard to charge forward, dealing Attack DMG.
Upon the skill cast, your Thunder Bonus is increased for a period.

3948.name: Rorola
3948.dialogue: Do you feel it? The presence of the ancestors. They have never forsaken the Kanamia Tribe.
3948.description:
Summons Rorola, resonating with the power of ancestors to gain a damage boost for some time. Also, every 10 hits on targets grant an additional damage boost, stacking up to 5 times. Once the cap is reached, subsequent hits extend the duration of the additional boost (the duration of the Base DMG boost does not extend). Each extension adds 3s, with a maximum of 5 extensions. At the same time, grants the Life Steal effect, restoring HP equal to a portion of damage dealt (the duration can extend).
This skill holds 2 charges.

3949.name: Dorothy
3949.dialogue: Technique is born from practice, but true artistry is born from responsibility.
3949.description:
Transforms into Dorothy, replacing basic attack modules and gaining Artisan's Power.
Passive: Dealing damage has a 40% chance to trigger Chain Lightning (trigger interval: at least 0.5s).
① Charges and fires a powerful shot at the target, dealing Attack DMG. Each additional charge increases the damage by 150%.
② Leaps into the air and launches a Thunderstorm Bolt at the target, dealing Attack DMG and creating a Thunderstorm Zone at the target for 7s. Thunderstorm Zone deals Attack DMG per second to enemies within and slows them.
③ Continuously unleashes Thunder Tracers, dealing Attack DMG and inflicting Paralysis on hit.
④ Fires an Oblivion Bomb, which explodes after traveling a distance or upon impact, dealing Attack DMG.

3950.name: Boyce
3950.dialogue: The truth of the world is meant to be this orderly, with no room for the slightest chaos.
3950.description:
Summons Boyce to create a field of frost by concentrating ice power, dealing Ice Magic DMG.
After casting, your ATK is increased for a period of time. Each cast of a Special Attack grants an additional increase, stacking up to 5 times. At max stacks, gain a bonus to Attack SPD and Casting SPD. Performing a Special Attack extends this bonus's duration by 3s, up to a max of 5 times (The ATK bonus's duration is not affected).
This skill holds 2 charges.

3951.name: Fafala
3951.dialogue: I'm truly happy that I can be of help to everyone! Please, don't stand on ceremony.
3951.description:
Summons Fafala to create a field.
You and allies within the field gain Final DMG Reduction and Super Armor. When you deal damage from inside the field, inflict bonus damage based on a percentage of your DEF (can trigger at most once every 1s). When you take damage, reduce the CD of this Skill by 1s (can trigger at most once every 2s).
[This effect does not stack. Only one instance of this effect can be active at a time.

3952.name: Blackstone Captain
3952.dialogue: Maintain vigilance. Any lapse in concentration is fatal.
3952.description:
Summons Boss: Blackstone Captain to ignite flames centered on yourself, dealing Fire Attack DMG.
After casting, your Attack SPD and Casting SPD are increased for a period of time.
passiveBufDescriptions: Ultimate Skill CD speed <style="accent-gn">+13%</style>
Ultimate Skill CD speed <style="accent-gn">+16.9%</style>

3953.name: Goblin Chief
3953.dialogue: Straighten up, you maggots! Your boss is here!
3953.description:
Summons Boss: Goblin Chief to briefly charge up and unleash a forward blade wave that deals Attack DMG.
After casting, your Expertise Skill's DMG and healing are increased for a period of time. During this time, dealing damage with an Expertise Skill reduces the CD of this Skill by 0.3s (can trigger at most once every 1s).
passiveBufDescriptions: Expertise Skill DMG and healing <style="accent-gn">+9%</style>

3954.name: Crimson Foxen
3954.description:
Summons Boss: Crimson Foxen to spin and pounce on the target, dealing Attack DMG.
After casting, your Companion ATK is increased for a period of time.
passiveBufDescriptions: After each Special Attack cast, Companion ATK <style="accent-gn">+2.4%</style> for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times.
After each Special Attack cast, Companion ATK <style="accent-gn">+3.12%</style> for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times.

After each Special Attack cast, Companion ATK <style="accent-gn">+6%</style> for <style="accent-gn">5s</style>, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">5</style> times.

3955.name: Cabbage Kingpin
3955.dialogue: Target acquired! Crushing blow!... (Misses) *Cough, cough* Ahem! Merely a strategic feint to test your resolve!
3955.description:
Summons Boss: Cabbage Kingpin to briefly charge up and slam the ground with a hammer, dealing Attack DMG.
After casting, your passive effect is locked to the displayed sigil for 20s, and its effect is increased by 100%-150%.

3956.name: Flamehorn
3956.dialogue: I am the fury of the earth, and the last ember of the forest!
3956.description:
Summons Boss: Flamehorn to repeatedly ram the target with its horns, dealing Attack DMG.
Grants a Luck effect: Triggering a Lucky Strike causes an explosion at the target's location, dealing Magic DMG (cooldown: 0.1s), and immediately grants the Absolute Luck effect. For the duration, Absolute Luck's cooldown becomes 5s.

3957.name: Basilisk
3957.dialogue: The very earth trembles beneath my feet, intruder!
3957.description:
Summons Boss: Basilisk to spin toward the target, dealing Attack DMG.
After casting, grants an All-Element Bonus to you and up to 10 nearby allies (prioritizing teammates) for a period of time.
(Cannot be affected by the same type of effect within 60s)

3958.name: Bluespine Lizard
3958.description:
Summons Elite: Bluespine Lizard to breathe frost forward, dealing Attack DMG to targets in the area.
After casting, increases Versatility for a period of time.

3959.name: Blackstone Commander
3959.dialogue: A chaotic magic source has been detected. In accordance with Legion law, I shall neutralize it.
3959.description:
Summons Elite: Blackstone Commander to call down lightning from the sky, dealing Magic DMG.
For a period of time after the skill is cast, when you deal damage, you will also deal additional Attack DMG to the target equal to a percentage of your Armor (can trigger at most once every 1s).

3960.name: Blackstone Vanguard
3960.dialogue: At last, a moving target! Come, have a taste of my blade!
3960.description: <style="accent-gn">Transforms into</style> Elite: Blackstone Vanguard to perform a spinning attack that deals Fire <style="physical">Attack DMG</style>. Every stack of Blade Intent allows for an additional spin (up to <style="accent-gn">15</style> stacks). This damage benefits from all types of elemental bonuses and is not affected by passive effects.
passiveBufDescriptions:
Reduces your total damage dealt by 80%
Each time you cast a non-Basic Attack Class Skill, reduces the CD of this skill by 1, and gains 1 stack of Blade Intent

3961.name: Goblin Trickster
3961.dialogue: You've just stepped into my "friendly" little welcoming trap!
3961.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons</style> Elite: Goblin Trickster to channel for a long time before dealing massive AoE <style="magic">Magic DMG</style>. (This skill damages enemies and up to <style="accent-gn">20</style> allies!)

When a Lucky Strike is landed, the Luck Effect may be activated: Triggers an explosion at the target, dealing Light <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">15.6%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

When a Lucky Strike is landed, the Luck Effect may be activated: Triggers an explosion at the target, dealing Light <style="physical">Attack DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">22.8%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

3962.name: Goblin Shaman
3962.dialogue: Hiss-kaka! New test subject! Let me give you a little prick.
3962.description:
Summons Elite: Goblin Shaman to briefly channel before summoning an exploding magic orb. The explosion deals Magic DMG to targets in the area and heals up to 10 nearby allies (prioritizing teammates).
After casting, for 20s, you deal damage every 2s to the surrounding area equal to 50% of the self-healing from your Class Skills.
passiveBufDescriptions: Every <style="accent-gn">5s</style>, your next hit includes an additional <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">45%</style> ATK. Each time you grant healing, increases your next such damage by <style="accent-gn">5%</style>, up to <style="accent-gn">+800%</style> (this damage cannot trigger Crit)

3963.name: Blackfire Foxen
3963.description:
Summons Elite: Blackfire Foxen to pounce on, bite, and then swipe its tail at the target, dealing Attack DMG.
After casting, your Mastery is increased for a period of time.

3964.name: Gloomy Cabbage
3964.dialogue: This blade of mine bears the weight of a thousand leaves... Yikes!
3964.description:
Summons Elite: Gloomy Cabbage to briefly charge up and swing a greatsword, dealing Attack DMG to targets in the area.
After casting, your Crit and Crit DMG are increased for a while (the values fluctuate based on the Cabbage sigil).
passiveBufDescriptions: Every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, your Crit DMG varies between <style="accent-gn">+5% and +7%</style>
Every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, your Crit DMG varies between <style="accent-gn">+6.5% and +9.1%</style>
Every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, your Crit DMG varies between <style="accent-gn">+8% and +11.2%</style>
Every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, your Crit DMG varies between <style="accent-gn">+9.5% and +13.3%</style>
Every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, your Crit DMG varies between <style="accent-gn">+11% and +15.4%</style>
Every <style="accent-gn">10s</style>, your Crit DMG varies between <style="accent-gn">+12.5% and +17.5%</style>

3965.name: Ruthless Cabbage
3965.dialogue: Heed the law of this magic! —Achoo!
3965.description: <style="accent-gn">Summons</style> Elite: Ruthless Cabbage to randomly call down <style="accent-gn">1-3</style> bolts of simulated lightning, dealing <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> to targets in the area.
passiveBufDescriptions: When a Lucky Strike is landed, the Luck Effect may be activated: Triggers an explosion at the target, randomly dealing <style="accent-gn">1 to 3</style> instances of Fire-Element <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">5%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

When a Lucky Strike is landed, the Luck Effect may be activated: Triggers an explosion at the target, randomly dealing <style="accent-gn">1 to 3</style> instances of Fire-Element <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">6.5%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

When a Lucky Strike is landed, the Luck Effect may be activated: Triggers an explosion at the target, randomly dealing <style="accent-gn">1 to 3</style> instances of Fire-Element <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">8%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

When a Lucky Strike is landed, the Luck Effect may be activated: Triggers an explosion at the target, randomly dealing <style="accent-gn">1 to 3</style> instances of Fire-Element <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">9.5%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

When a Lucky Strike is landed, the Luck Effect may be activated: Triggers an explosion at the target, randomly dealing <style="accent-gn">1 to 3</style> instances of Fire-Element <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">11%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

When a Lucky Strike is landed, the Luck Effect may be activated: Triggers an explosion at the target, randomly dealing <style="accent-gn">1 to 3</style> instances of Fire-Element <style="magic">Magic DMG</style> equal to <style="accent-gn">12.5%</style> ATK (CD: <style="accent-gn">0.1s</style>)

3966.name: Emerald Caprahorn
3966.dialogue: The forest will remember your passage, whether in kindness or in malice.
3966.description:
Summons Elite: Emerald Caprahorn to fire two consecutive projectiles, dealing Attack DMG to targets in the area.
After casting, your Haste is increased for a period of time.

3982.name: Lucy
3982.description:
Transform into Celestial Spirit Mage - Lucy, replacing your skill set while gaining Ability Conversion.
Passive: Dealing damage converts 50% of the damage dealt into healing for up to 10 nearby allies (prioritizing teammates).
1. Fleuve d'Étoiles: Manifests the Fleuve d'Étoiles and swings it continuously, dealing Light Magic DMG to targets.
2. Celestial Guardian: Harnesses the power of Celestial Spirits to grant a shield lasting 20s to up to 10 allies within range (prioritizing teammates). Simultaneously inflicts debuffs on up to 5 enemies within range, reducing ATK, applying Vulnerability, and reducing Element Resistance for 10s.
3. Aqua Records: Draws upon the power of Aquarius to unleash waves forward, dealing Water Magic DMG to targets in their path, with an additional 50% of the damage dealt converted into healing.
activeEffectParams: Celestial Spirit Guard Elemental Resistance Reduction

3983.name: Natsu
3983.description:
Transform into Fire Dragon Slayer - Natsu, replacing your skill set while gaining Ability Conversion.
Passive: Casting skills other than an Ultimate Skill grants stacks of Dragon Flame based on the skill type. Every 10 stacks of Dragon Flame automatically converts into 1 stack of Dragon Force. Dragon Force can stack up to 5 times. Each stack of Dragon Force grants a Fire Bonus.
1. Fire Dragon's Iron Fist: Charges briefly before unleashing a blazing punch forward, dealing Fire Attack DMG and accumulating 5 stacks of Dragon Flame.
2. Fire Dragon's Wing Attack: Leaps fiercely and dashes forward, dealing Fire Attack DMG and accumulating 5 stacks of Dragon Flame.
3. Fire Dragon's Roar: Gathers the power of flames to spew a massive blast of fire forward, dealing Fire Attack DMG. If at max Dragon Force stacks, consumes all stacks of Dragon Force to gain CD reduction for Natsu's skills and a Fire Bonus. This effect persists for the duration of the current transformation and can stack up to 3 times.
activeEffectParams:
[Fire Dragon's Iron Fist]
Fire Dragon's Iron Fist DMG

[Fire Dragon's Wing Attack]
Fire Dragon's Wing Attack DMG

attrDescs.2200020: <style="accent-gn">3</style> points of <linktext=1167><style="ItemQuality_5">Blade Intent</style></linktext> are gained when an <style="accent-gn">Expertise Skill</style> is cast.
attrDescs.2200050: When <style="accent-gn">Basic Attacks</style> deal DMG, <style="accent-gn">10%</style> chance to trigger <linktext=1096><style="ItemQuality_5">Piercing Slash</style></linktext>, once <style="accent-gn">per</style> second.

attrDescs.2200070: <linktext=1500><style="ItemQuality_5">Iaido Slash</style></linktext> Crit +<style="accent-gn">10%</style>. attrDescs.2200120: Each cast of <linktext=1501><style="ItemQuality_5">Flash Strike</style></linktext>, <linktext=1554><style="ItemQuality_5">Raijin Dash</style></linktext>, or its enhanced skills grants <style="accent-gn">1</style> stack of <style="accent-gn">Thundrage</style>. For <style="accent-gn">each</style> <linktext=1104><style="ItemQuality_5">Thunder Sigil</style></linktext> consumed, the chance increases by <style="accent-gn">10%</style>.
attrDescs.2200150: Every <style="accent-gn">3</style> casts of <linktext=1556><style="ItemQuality_5">Overdrive</style></linktext> allows the next <linktext=1500><style="ItemQuality_5">Iaido Slash</style></linktext> to generate a <linktext=1099><style="ItemQuality_5">Bladewind Domain</style></linktext> in front. attrDescs.2200160: <linktext=1101><style="ItemQuality_5">Moonblades</style></linktext> have a fixed <style="accent-gn">60%</style> chance to cast <linktext=1100><style="ItemQuality_5">Thunderstrike</style></linktext> on a Lucky Strike. <linktext=1100><style="ItemQuality_5">Thunderstrike</style></linktext> deals double DMG.
attrDescs.2200170: Lucky Strikes of <linktext=1101><style="ItemQuality_5">Moonblades</style></linktext> grant a fixed <style="accent-gn">30%</style> chance to restore <style="accent-gn">1</style> <linktext=1104><style="ItemQuality_5">Thunder Sigil</style></linktext>, once per <style="accent-gn">2</style> seconds.
attrDescs.2200180: For <style="accent-gn">12</style> seconds after casting <linktext=1506><style="ItemQuality_5">Chaos Breaker</style></linktext>, whenever the Talents Raijin Dash Charge, Moonlight Charge, and Charge Catcher obtain a <linktext=1106><style="ItemQuality_5">Charge Seed</style></linktext>, <style="accent-gn">1</style> additional Charge Seed is granted.
attrDescs.2200210: Casting <linktext=1503><style="ItemQuality_5">Thundercut</style></linktext> grants <style="accent-gn">12</style> + Luck% x <style="accent-gn">10</style> points of <linktext=1167><style="ItemQuality_5">Blade Intent</style></linktext>.
attrDescs.2200220: For every <style="accent-gn">10</style> instances of damage dealt, triggers <style="accent-gn">Thunder Power</style>. <style="accent-gn">Thunder Power</style>: Thunder DMG +<style="accent-gn">15</style> for <style="accent-gn">10</style>s, up to <style="accent-gn">10</style> stacks.
attrDescs.2200230: <linktext=1167><style="ItemQuality_5">Blade Intent</style></linktext> cap +<style="accent-gn">25</style>. attrDescs.2200250: <style="accent-gn">Special Attacks</style> inflict <style="accent-gn">Thunder Curse</style> on the target upon dealing DMG. <style="accent-gn">Thunder Curse</style>: Each stack of <style="accent-gn">Thunder Curse</style> increases the target's DMG taken from you by <style="accent-gn">2%</style> for <style="accent-gn">10</style>s, stacking up to <style="accent-gn">4</style> times.
attrDescs.2200260: Deals <style="accent-gn">20%</style> more DMG to enemies with <style="accent-gn">80%</style> HP or above.
attrDescs.2200280: Defeating an enemy triggers <linktext=1103><style="ItemQuality_5">Thunderburst</style></linktext>, once every <style="accent-gn">3s</style>.
attrDescs.2200300: For <style="accent-gn">each</style> enemy within <style="accent-gn">3</style>m, you gain <style="accent-gn">3%</style> Armor Penetration, up to <style="accent-gn">15%</style>. This effect is doubled against Elite or stronger enemies.
attrDescs.2200310: When <linktext=1104><style="ItemQuality_5">Thunder Sigils</style></linktext> are at <style="accent-gn">3</style> or higher, <style="accent-gn">Special Attack</style> hits <style="accent-gn">twice</style> times consecutively.
attrDescs.2200320: Further enhances the ability to use Iaido Slash. When the number of Thunder Sigils consumed by Iaido Slash and its enhanced skill (Thunder Cut) equals the current maximum Thunder Sigil count, increases the DMG of Iaido Slash and its enhanced skill (Thunder Cut) by 12% and grants Super Armor during the cast. Consume as many Thunder Sigils as possible to deliver a powerful blow to the target with Iaido Slash. High Crit and Mastery allow Iaido Slash to deal greater DMG and more hits. Under certain conditions, Iaido Slash no longer needs to be channeled.
attrDescs.2200340: Triggers Sharp Strike when casting <linktext=1500><style="ItemQuality_5">Iaido Slash</style></linktext> and its enhanced skill (<linktext=1588><style="ItemQuality_5">Thunder Cut</style></linktext>). attrDescs.2200430: Activate <linktext=1504><style="ItemQuality_5">Volt Surge</style></linktext>. <linktext=1501><style="ItemQuality_5">Flash Strike</style></linktext> and <linktext=1554><style="ItemQuality_5">Raijin Dash</style></linktext> evolve into <linktext=1584><style="ItemQuality_5">Dracoflash</style></linktext> and <linktext=1585><style="ItemQuality_5">Phantom Slash</style></linktext>.

attrDescs.2202110: Further enhances the ability to use Wild Bloom. Wild Bloom, Regen Pulse, and ​Nature Ward​ grant Symbiotic Mark to allies. Symbiotic Mark: Lasts for 10s. This effect can trigger only once every 30s. Healing of Stillness: If the caster deals no DMG to enemies for 5s, each hit of the caster's Basic Attack will heal up to 10 allies (party members prioritized), with the 4-hit combo restoring 12.6% Max HP in total.
